_comment: Domain DAT LICH (phong kham) — nang luc: TRA CUU THONG TIN + action co xac nhan. Khong co cong xac thuc nang (do nhay thap).

tools.name: check_availability
tools.description: check open appointment slots for a service on a date

tools.name: create_booking
tools.description: create a new appointment after a slot is chosen

tools.name: reschedule_booking
tools.description: move an existing booking to a new date/time

tools.name: cancel_booking
tools.description: cancel an existing booking by id

tools.name: get_booking
tools.description: look up details of an existing booking by id
